message:
fix(fp-frame): resolve clippy warnings in interpolate_method and pivot_table_with_margins

- Replace loop index with iterator in interpolate_method zero/pad branch
- Collapse nested if-let in pivot_table_with_margins
- Remove unused variable n
- Add #[allow(clippy::type_complexity)] to assign_fn signature
